[High-level description of the approach. How will users interact with this feature?]

### Out of Scope

[What this feature explicitly does NOT include — helps agent stay focused]

- [ ] [Question about scope or priorities?]

## PROPOSED IMPLEMENTATION STEPS

> **Status tags**: `[COMPLETED]` | `[IN PROGRESS]` | `[]` (pending)
>
> Agent updates these steps as work progresses. Never proceed to next step without approval.

### Phase 1: Research & Design

- [ ] Step 1.1 — [Research existing code/patterns]
- [ ] Step 1.2 — [Clarify requirements with stakeholders]
- [ ] Step 1.3 — [Finalize technical approach]

### Phase 2: Implementation

- [ ] Step 2.1 — [Create skeleton/structure]
- [ ] Step 2.2 — [Implement core functionality]
- [ ] Step 2.3 — [Add error handling and edge cases]

### Phase 3: Testing & Validation

- [ ] Step 3.1 — [Write unit tests]
- [ ] Step 3.2 — [Integration testing]
- [ ] Step 3.3 — [Manual validation]

### Phase 4: Documentation & Cleanup

- [ ] Step 4.1 — [Update documentation]
- [ ] Step 4.2 — [Code review and cleanup]
- [ ] Step 4.3 — [Final validation]
